alt="All-on-4 patient result" loading="lazy" style="object-position:top center">
        <div class="g-card-flag"><svg width="22" height="15" viewBox="0 0 20 14"><rect width="20" height="14" fill="#00008B"/><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="10" y2="7" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="10" y1="0" x2="0" y2="7" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="4" y="0" width="2" height="7" fill="#fff"/><rect x="0" y="2.5" width="10" height="2" fill="#fff"/><rect x="4.5" y="0" width="1" height="7" fill="#C8102E"/><rect x="0" y="3" width="10" height="1" fill="#C8102E"/></svg></div>
        <div class="g-card-overlay"></div>
        <div class="g-card-info">
          <p class="card-label">Full Arch · Upper &amp; Lower</p>
          <div class="card-brand-row">
            <span class="card-brand">Straumann®</span>
            <span class="card-origin">Switzerland</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-warranty"><svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg><span>Lifetime Warranty</span></div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card-hover-border"></div>
      </div>
      <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:64px;" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <p class="gallery-hint">
    <span style="opacity:0.4">←</span>
    <span id="dragHintText"> Drag to explore </span>
    <span style="opacity:0.4">→</span>
  </p>
  <div class="gallery-cta">
    <a href="#form-section" class="btn-gold" style="display:inline-block; padding:16px 40px; font-size:16px;">Start Your Transformation</a>
  </div>
</section>
<!-- FAQ -->
<section id="faq">
  <div class="faq-inner">
    <div class="faq-header">
      <div class="gold-bar"></div>
      <h2>Common Questions</h2>
      <p>Everything you need to know before taking the first step</p>
    </div>
    <div class="faq-list">

      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          <span>Is it safe to have dental surgery in Vietnam?</span>
          <svg class="faq-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a">
          <p>Greenfield Dental operates to international clinical standards using the same Swiss and European implant systems used in Australia. Our surgeons are internationally trained and the clinic is equipped with the latest European technology. Thousands of patients from Australia, the UK and the US have been treated here safely.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          <span>How many trips do I need to make?</span>
          <svg class="faq-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a">
          <p>Your implants are placed and within 5 days you leave with a fixed temporary set of teeth — so you return home smiling, not waiting. The final porcelain crowns require a minimum of 3 months for the implants to fully integrate with the bone. Most patients return for their permanent teeth on a second trip, which many combine with another visit to Vietnam. We coordinate everything around your schedule.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          <span>What happens if something goes wrong after I return home?</span>
          <svg class="faq-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a">
          <p>All our implants carry a warranty of 15 years to lifetime depending on the system chosen — and if anything implant-related ever arises, we cover it at zero cost to you. Our team remains fully accessible via WhatsApp and video consultation long after you return home. That said, in complete honesty — to date our surgeons have not had a single implant failure. That's not luck. It's the result of meticulous placement technique, premium-grade materials and careful patient selection. We take the same pride in your result after the procedure as we do during it.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          <span>Why is the cost so much lower than Australia?</span>
          <svg class="faq-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a">
          <p>Lower overheads, cost of living and labour in Vietnam — not lower quality. We use the same Straumann® and Neodent® implants as premium Australian clinics. You're paying for the procedure, not Sydney rent and insurance premiums. The saving typically covers your flights, hotel and a holiday in full.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="faq-item">
        <button class="faq-q" onclick="toggleFaq(this)">
          <span>What does the free consultation include?</span>
          <svg class="faq-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M6 9l6 6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <div class="faq-a">
          <p>A personalised video or WhatsApp call with a member of our clinical team. We'll review your dental history, discuss your goals, provide a transparent cost estimate and answer every question you have — with zero pressure or obligation.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="form-section">
  <div class="form-wrap">
    <div class="form-header">
      <div class="gold-bar"></div>
      <h2>Private Smile Assessment</h2>
      <p class="form-subtitle">For Australian Patients Considering Full Arch Restoration</p>
      <div class="form-trust-row">
        <div class="form-trust-item">
          <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>
          Private &amp; Confidential
        </div>
        <div class="form-trust-item">
          <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>
          Response in Minutes
        </div>
        <div class="form-trust-item">
          <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 013.07 10.8a19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.68A2 2 0 012 0h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L6.09 7.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 14.92z"/></svg>
          No Obligation
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="form-card">
      <!-- Stepper -->
      <div class="stepper">
        <div class="step-node">
          <div class="step-circle active" id="sc1">1</div>
          <span class="step-lbl active" id="sl1">Condition</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step-conn" id="sconn1"></div>
        <div class="step-node">
          <div class="step-circle" id="sc2">2</div>
          <span class="step-lbl" id="sl2">Symptoms</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step-conn" id="sconn2"></div>
        <div class="step-node">
          <div class="step-circle" id="sc3">3</div>
          <span class="step-lbl" id="sl3">Travel</span>
        </div>
        <div class="step-conn" id="sconn3"></div>
        <div class="step-node">
          <div class="step-circle" id="sc4">4</div>
          <span class="step-lbl" id="sl4">Details</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="form-body">
        <!-- Step 1 -->
        <div class="form-step active" id="fstep1">
          <h3 class="step-title">Your Current Dental Condition</h3>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="radio" name="condition" value="I wear full dentures" onchange="checkStep1()"><label>I wear full dentures</label></label>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="radio" name="condition" value="I have multiple missing teeth" onchange="checkStep1()"><label>I have multiple missing teeth</label></label>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="radio" name="condition" value="My teeth are failing / breaking" onchange="checkStep1()"><label>My teeth are failing / breaking</label></label>
          <div class="form-nav">
            <div></div>
            <button class="btn-cont" id="btnNext1" onclick="goNext(1)" disabled>Continue <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg></button>
          </div>
          <div class="mobile-step-count">Step 1 of 4</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Step 2 -->
        <div class="form-step" id="fstep2">
          <h3 class="step-title">Are you experiencing any of these?</h3>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="checkbox" name="symptoms" value="Difficulty chewing" onchange="checkStep2()"><label>Difficulty chewing</label></label>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="checkbox" name="symptoms" value="Pain or infection" onchange="checkStep2()"><label>Pain or infection</label></label>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="checkbox" name="symptoms" value="Loose / uncomfortable dentures" onchange="checkStep2()"><label>Loose / uncomfortable dentures</label></label>
          <div class="form-nav">
            <button class="btn-back" onclick="goBack(2)">Back</button>
            <button class="btn-cont" id="btnNext2" onclick="goNext(2)" disabled>Continue <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg></button>
          </div>
          <div class="mobile-step-count">Step 2 of 4</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Step 3 -->
        <div class="form-step" id="fstep3">
          <h3 class="step-title">Open to travelling to Vietnam for premium treatment?</h3>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="radio" name="travel" value="Yes – within 3 months" onchange="checkStep3()"><label>Yes – within 3 months</label></label>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="radio" name="travel" value="Yes – exploring options" onchange="checkStep3()"><label>Yes – exploring options</label></label>
          <label class="opt-row"><input type="radio" name="travel" value="Not sure yet" onchange="checkStep3()"><label>Not sure yet</label></label>
          <div class="form-nav">
            <button class="btn-back" onclick="goBack(3)">Back</button>
            <button class="btn-cont" id="btnNext3" onclick="goNext(3)" disabled>Continue <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg></button>
          </div>
          <div class="mobile-step-count">Step 3 of 4</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Step 4 -->
        <div class="form-step" id="fstep4">
          <h3 class="step-title">Your Contact Details</h3>
          <input type="text" id="fName" class="field-input" placeholder="Full Name" oninput="checkStep4()">
          <input type="tel" id="fPhone" class="field-input" placeholder="Phone (Australia)" oninput="checkStep4()">
          <input type="email" id="fEmail" class="field-input" placeholder="Email Address" oninput="checkStep4()">
          <p class="contact-lbl">Best way to contact you:</p>
          <div class="contact-grid">
            <button class="cm-btn sel" id="cm-whatsapp" onclick="selContact('whatsapp')" type="button">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
              WhatsApp
            </button>
            <button class="cm-btn" id="cm-phone" onclick="selContact('phone')" type="button">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 013.07 10.8a19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.68A2 2 0 012 0h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L6.09 7.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 14.92z"/></svg>
              Phone Call
            </button>
            <button class="cm-btn" id="cm-email" onclick="selContact('email')" type="button">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
              Email
            </button>
            <button class="cm-btn" id="cm-sms" onclick="selContact('sms')" type="button">
              <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 01-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 012-2h14a2 2 0 012 2z"/></svg>
              SMS
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="form-nav">
            <button class="btn-back" onclick="goBack(4)">Back</button>
            <button class="btn-submit" id="btnSubmit" onclick="submitForm()" disabled>
              <span class="hide-mobile">Request Private Consultation</span>
              <span class="show-mobile" style="display:none">Submit Request</span>
            </button>
            <p class="form-respond-note">
              <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg>
              We respond within 2 hours during clinic hours
            </p>
          </div>
          <div class="mobile-step-count">Step 4 of 4</div>
        </div>

        <!-- Success -->
        <div class="form-success" id="formSuccess">
          <div class="success-icon">
            <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="white" stroke-width="3"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>
          </div>
          <h3>Thank you for your assessment.</h3>
          <p>A member of our clinical team will review your responses and contact you within a few minutes to arrange your complimentary consultation.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <p class="form-privacy" id="formPrivacy">Your information is kept strictly confidential and will never be shared.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- LIGHTBOX -->
<div class="lightbox" id="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">
  <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox()" aria-label="Close">
    <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"><line x1="2" y1="2" x2="16" y2="16"/><line x1="16" y1="2" x2="2" y2="16"/></svg>
  </button>
  <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightboxImg" src="" alt="Patient transformation" onclick="toggleZoom(event)">
  <div class="lightbox-hint" id="lightboxHint">Click image to zoom in</div>
</div>


<!-- TESTIMONIALS -->
<section id="testimonials">
  <div class="testi-header">
    <div class="gold-bar" style="margin:0 auto 16px;"></div>
    <h2>What Our Patients Say</h2>
    <p>Real words from real people who made the journey</p>
  </div>
  <div class="testi-grid">

    <div class="testi-card">
      <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
      <p class="testi-quote">"Best decision of my life. I saved over $22,000 and the team treated me like royalty from the moment I arrived. My new smile has completely changed my confidence."</p>
      <div class="testi-author">
        <div class="testi-avatar">M</div>
        <div>
          <strong>Mark T.</strong>
          <span>Sydney, Australia · All-on-4 Upper &amp; Lower</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="testi-card testi-card--featured">
      <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
      <p class="testi-quote">"I was nervous about travelling for dental surgery but Greenfield made everything seamless. The clinic is honestly nicer than anything back home. Zero regrets."</p>
      <div class="testi-author">
        <div class="testi-avatar">S</div>
        <div>
          <strong>Sarah K.</strong>
          <span>Melbourne, Australia · Full Arch Restoration</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="testi-card">
      <div class="testi-stars">★★★★★</div>
      <p class="testi-quote">"The results exceeded everything I expected. I can eat, laugh and smile freely for the first time in years. The team's follow-up care back home has also been excellent."</p>
      <div class="testi-author">
        <div class="testi-avatar">D</div>
        <div>
          <strong>David R.</strong>
          <span>Brisbane, Australia · All-on-4 Upper</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- TRUST MARQUEE -->
<div class="trust-bar">
  <div class="trust-fade-l"></div>
  <div class="trust-fade-r"></div>
  <div class="trust-track">
    <!-- Set 1 -->
    <div class="t-item">Trustpilot <span class="t-stars">★★★★★</span></div>
    <div class="t-item">Straumann®</div>
    <div class="t-item">Neodent®</div>
    <div class="t-gflex"><span class="gflex-chrome">G-FLEX</span></div>
    <div class="t-item">Dentium®</div>
    <div class="t-item">Ivoclar®</div>
    <div class="t-item">Invisalign®</div>
    <div class="t-warranty"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg> 15 Year Warranty</div>
    <div class="t-item"><span class="t-google-g">G</span> 4.9 <span class="t-stars">★★★★★</span></div>
    <!-- Set 2 (duplicate for seamless loop) -->
    <div class="t-item">Trustpilot <span class="t-stars">★★★★★</span></div>
    <div class="t-item">Straumann®</div>
    <div class="t-item">Neodent®</div>
    <div class="t-gflex"><span class="gflex-chrome">G-FLEX</span></div>
    <div class="t-item">Dentium®</div>
    <div class="t-item">Ivoclar®</div>
    <div class="t-item">Invisalign®</div>
    <div class="t-warranty"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg> 15 Year Warranty</div>
    <div class="t-item"><span class="t-google-g">G</span> 4.9 <span class="t-stars">★★★★★</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA SECTION -->
<section id="cta-section" class="cv-auto">
  <div class="top-bar"></div>
  <h2 class="cta-heading" id="ctaHeading">Your New <span class="smile-flip-container"><span class="smile-flip-inner" id="smileFlip"><span class="smile-flip-front">Smile</span><span class="smile-flip-back"><svg class="smile-icon" viewBox="0 0 200 100"><path d="M22,48 Q100,105 178,48 Q100,72 22,48 Z"/><path d="M22,48 C14,40 12,28 18,20 C19,32 20,40 22,48 Z"/><path d="M178,48 C186,40 188,28 182,20 C181,32 180,40 178,48 Z"/></svg></span></span></span> Begins with a Consultation</h2>
  <p>Our experienced implant team will assess your suitability, explain the process clearly, and outline tailored treatment options.</p>
  <p class="cta-gold-note">100% obligation-free · No upfront cost</p>
  <div class="cta-btn-wrap">
    <div class="cta-btn-frame">
      <a href="#form-section" class="cta-premium-btn">
        <span class="cta-btn-text">Book a Complimentary Consultation</span>
        <svg class="cta-btn-arrow" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14"/><path d="m12 5 7 7-7 7"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FORM SECTION -->

<!-- CLINIC MAP -->
<section id="clinic">
  <div class="clinic-header">
    <div class="gold-bar"></div>
    <h2>Our Dental Clinic</h2>
    <p>Greenfield Dental — Hanoi, Vietnam</p>
  </div>
  <div class="clinic-grid" id="clinicGrid">
    <div class="clinic-map clinic-location-photo">
      <img 4I5ElE48pSVF9zZZd6NrbynT9ykynZGc4Aud8o4lXjDjoUTEURWDcUs26NtZDtCWYrsCDQOJLNRC3jCayAZamsDxIlr3TZtjdBAiyVkTNSIHGLqgdglmouaE1tKAWbimzcMAi2TWvxIBgJi0ciIQmzUA7a0rIlsFGyCJHGmIUg3E4pWVELJEYKXFZMRfSgilbiUs3DFLqQRSspJcaCFkxaDgQiJWQAdE08yE6HFW7JrKCiYiDoUSwgq+WcoUHRDiU0qkWlRzcVadEQhmMjCymgKyVgpltgmsoIgJWwT2SsimtglZOQn4sUESLp7J7JWQRslZSSsghfmT2Us23GmI4kDWTgJW406BibJtKcj70rBA1uNMVJK+GhBH8E9jbSn7EjyoIpYp09kELp8LKXGmtigG6Jj9LRflTCORm8meOY4hFsUyBmzVDN+1kg5RgVMVjBv2vZrGCjxpIDsljkG4e12oqVwCqboY3YlovyjApNbI3eTOHM7FBc40ifuVQTVDSc5jHt5Wmx+5TFWz44dGfnBBYv1J0NsjHjcuDhrT3RE7pr81kxKjdBK6bOw0JuNMb5yCXUmv+Ca4JTXHKgfiSTJIOudE250qJibzpJIG2pvOoGNt7YpJIVAxt51F0TedJJVETGOUptrGGlJJUPtY5SltTedJJA2YL8aW1i/GkkqG2sW0lNmC3GkkgbawRpKZ0YscSkkgYRi+kpbWOUpJII7WOUpCNvOkkgbaxylLaxylJJBExgcqfaxbSUklQ21jlKW1i+kpJIEYxcYlNtYtpKSSBBgsMSkYxfSUkkC2sc6baxzpJIFtTedRdE210kkoG+BnOgOhbfSUklmrEdqbylNtYvxpJLIW1N5Sm2sC+lJJA+1jlKW1g8ZSSRS2scpSzBfjSSQLaxzpCIX0lJJA+1g8qbawRxpJIGEYI0lIxjDSkkgfahylNtY50kkDbWL6SltYtpKSSB9rHKUtrHKUkkDZgvbFLMHKUkkDbWOUpCMG+lJJAjGOUpjGOUpJIEGDDEpbWDypJKhhGCDiUtrBHGkkiIGmjJvbHlGCDKHQNuyR+om4SSUUelcZW3cbY8SPtYJJueRJJEPtY5SmLABgToSSQNmDlKYRgi+KSSBCMXGJSSSQf//Z" alt="Five-Star Amenities" loading="lazy">
        <div class="c-slide-grad"></div>
        <div class="c-slide-caption">
          <h4>Five-Star Amenities</h4>
          <span>Every Detail Considered</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="c-dots">
        <button class="c-dot active" style="width:22px" onclick="goToSlide(0)" aria-label="Slide 1"></button>
        <button class="c-dot" style="width:7px" onclick="goToSlide(1)" aria-label="Slide 2"></button>
        <button class="c-dot" style="width:7px" onclick="goToSlide(2)" aria-label="Slide 3"></button>
        <button class="c-dot" style="width:7px" onclick="goToSlide(3)" aria-label="Slide 4"></button>
        <button class="c-dot" style="width:7px" onclick="goToSlide(4)" aria-label="Slide 5"></button>
        <button class="c-dot" style="width:7px" onclick="goToSlide(5)" aria-label="Slide 6"></button>
        <button class="c-dot" style="width:7px" onclick="goToSlide(6)" aria-label="Slide 7"></button>
        <button class="c-dot" style="width:7px" onclick="goToSlide(7)" aria-label="Slide 8"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="c-arrows">
        <button class="c-arrow c-prev" onclick="prevSlide()" aria-label="Previous">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M15 18l-6-6 6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <button class="c-arrow c-next" onclick="nextSlide()" aria-label="Next">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M9 18l6-6-6-6"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="top-line"></div>
  <h3>Greenfield Dental Clinic</h3>
  <p>Providing premium dental implant solutions for Australian patients in Hanoi, Vietnam.</p>
  <p class="copyright">© 2026 Greenfield Dental Clinic | Hanoi, Vietnam. All Rights Reserved.</p>
</footer>

<!-- MOBILE STICKY BAR -->
<div class="mobile-sticky">
  <a href="tel:+84906621988" class="ms-call">
    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 01-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 01-8.63-3.07A19.5 19.5 0 013.07 10.8a19.79 19.79 0 01-3.07-8.68A2 2 0 012 0h3a2 2 0 012 1.72c.127.96.361 1.903.7 2.81a2 2 0 01-.45 2.11L6.09 7.91a16 16 0 006 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 012.11-.45c.907.339 1.85.573 2.81.7A2 2 0 0122 14.92z"/></svg>
    Call Now
  </a>
  <a href="#form-section" class="ms-book">Book Free Consultation</a>
</div>

<!-- Netlify form handler -->
<form name="smile-assessment" netlify netlify-honeypot="bot-field" hidden>
  <input name="name"><input name="phone"><input name="email">
  <input name="condition"><input name="symptoms"><input name="travel"><input name="contact_preference">
</form>

<script>

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {

// ── FAQ ACCORDION ──
function toggleFaq(btn) {
  const item = btn.parentElement;
  const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
  document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item.open').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
  if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
}

// ── NAVBAR ──
let menuOpen = false;
function toggleMenu() {
  menuOpen = !menuOpen;
  document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.toggle('open', menuOpen);
  document.body.style.overflow = menuOpen ? 'hidden' : '';
}
function closeMenu() {
  menuOpen = false;
  document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
}


// ── GALLERY DRAG ──
const gWrap = document.getElementById('galleryWrap');
let isDrag = false, startX = 0, scrollL = 0, hasDragged = false;

if (gWrap) gWrap.addEventListener('pointerdown', e => {
  isDrag = true; hasDragged = false;
  startX = e.clientX; scrollL = gWrap.scrollLeft;
  gWrap.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
});
if (gWrap) gWrap.addEventListener('pointermove', e => {
  if (!isDrag) return;
  const dx = e.clientX - startX;
  if (Math.abs(dx) > 5) hasDragged = true;
  gWrap.scrollLeft = scrollL - dx * 1.5;
});
if (gWrap) gWrap.addEventListener('pointerup', () => { isDrag = false; });
if (gWrap) gWrap.addEventListener('pointercancel', () => { isDrag = false; });

// detect touch for hint text
if ('ontouchstart' in window) {
  document.getElementById('dragHintText').textContent = ' Swipe to explore ';
}

// ── LIGHTBOX ──
let zoomed = false;
function openLightbox(card) {
  if (hasDragged) return;
  const img = card.querySelector('img');
  document.getElementById('lightboxImg').src = img.src;
  document.getElementById('lightboxImg').classList.remove('zoomed');
  zoomed = false;
  document.getElementById('lightboxHint').textContent = 'Click image to zoom in';
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
}
function closeLightbox() {
  document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
  document.body.style.overflow = '';
  zoomed = false;
}
function toggleZoom(e) {
  e.stopPropagation();
  zoomed = !zoomed;
  document.getElementById('lightboxImg').classList.toggle('zoomed', zoomed);
  document.getElementById('lightboxHint').textContent = zoomed ? 'Click image to zoom out' : 'Click image to zoom in';
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeLightbox(); });

// ── FORM ──
let currentStep = 1;
let contactMethod = 'whatsapp';

function updateStepper(step) {
  for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) {
    const c = document.getElementById('sc' + i);
    const l = document.getElementById('sl' + i);
    if (i < step) {
      c.classList.add('done'); c.classList.remove('active');
      c.innerHTML = '<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"/></svg>';
      l.classList.remove('active');
      if (i <= 3) document.getElementById('sconn' + i).classList.add('done');
    } else if (i === step) {
      c.classList.add('active'); c.classList.remove('done');
      c.innerHTML = i;
      l.classList.add('active');
    } else {
      c.classList.remove('active', 'done');
      c.innerHTML = i;
      l.classList.remove('active');
    }
  }
}

function showStep(step) {
  for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) document.getElementById('fstep' + i).classList.remove('active');
  document.getElementById('fstep' + step).classList.add('active');
  updateStepper(step);
  currentStep = step;
}

function goNext(from) {
  showStep(from + 1);
}
function goBack(from) {
  showStep(from - 1);
}

function checkStep1() {
  const ok = !!document.querySelector('input[name="condition"]:checked');
  const btn = document.getElementById('btnNext1');
  btn.disabled = !ok;
  btn.classList.toggle('on', ok);
}
function checkStep2() {
  const ok = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="symptoms"]:checked').length > 0;
  const btn = document.getElementById('btnNext2');
  btn.disabled = !ok;
  btn.classList.toggle('on', ok);
}
function checkStep3() {
  const ok = !!document.querySelector('input[name="travel"]:checked');
  const btn = document.getElementById('btnNext3');
  btn.disabled = !ok;
  btn.classList.toggle('on', ok);
}
function checkStep4() {
  const n = document.getElementById('fName').value.trim();
  const p = document.getElementById('fPhone').value.trim();
  const e = document.getElementById('fEmail').value.trim();
  const ok = n && p && e;
  const btn = document.getElementById('btnSubmit');
  btn.disabled = !ok;
  btn.classList.toggle('on', ok);
}

function selContact(type) {
  contactMethod = type;
  ['whatsapp','phone','email','sms'].forEach(t => document.getElementById('cm-' + t).classList.remove('sel'));
  document.getElementById('cm-' + type).classList.add('sel');
}

async function submitForm() {
  const n = document.getElementById('fName').value.trim();
  const p = document.getElementById('fPhone').value.trim();
  const e = document.getElementById('fEmail').value.trim();
  if (!n || !p || !e) return;

  const condition = document.querySelector('input[name="condition"]:checked')?.value || '';
  const symptoms = [...document.querySelectorAll('input[name="symptoms"]:checked')].map(c => c.value).join(', ');
  const travel = document.querySelector('input[name="travel"]:checked')?.value || '';

  // Show loading state on button
  const btn = document.getElementById('btnSubmit');
  const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
  btn.innerHTML = '<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" style="animation:spin 1s linear infinite"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 11-6.219-8.56"/></svg> Sending...';
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.style.opacity = '0.8';

  // ── FORMSPREE (works immediately, no server needed) ──
  // Sends email directly to Anass.L@nhakhoagreenfield.com
  try {
    const response = await fetch('https://formspree.io/f/xnjboekz', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Accept': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        name: n,
        phone: p,
        email: e,
        condition: condition,
        symptoms: symptoms,
        travel: travel,
        contact_preference: contactMethod,
        _subject: '🦷 New All-on-4 Lead: ' + n + ' (' + p + ')',
        _replyto: e
      })
    });

    if (response.ok) {
      showSuccess();
    } else {
      // Fallback: try Netlify Forms
      await sendNetlify(n, p, e, condition, symptoms, travel);
    }
  } catch(err) {
    // Fallback: try Netlify Forms
    await sendNetlify(n, p, e, condition, symptoms, travel);
  }

  // Conversion tracking
  if (typeof gtag !== 'undefined') {
    gtag('event', 'conversion', {'send_to': 'AW-11508258289'});
    gtag('event', 'generate_lead', {currency: 'AUD', value: 1.0});
  }
  if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') {
    fbq('track', 'Lead', {content_name: 'All-on-4 Consultation', currency: 'AUD', value: 1.0});
  }
  if (typeof dataLayer !== 'undefined') {
    dataLayer.push({event: 'form_submit', formName: 'smile-assessment'});
  }
}

async function sendNetlify(n, p, e, condition, symptoms, travel) {
  const body = new URLSearchParams({
    'form-name': 'smile-assessment',
    name: n, phone: p, email: e,
    condition, symptoms, travel,
    contact_preference: contactMethod
  }).toString();
  await fetch('/', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body
  }).catch(() => {});
  showSuccess();
}

function showSuccess() {
  for (let i = 1; i <= 4; i++) document.getElementById('fstep' + i).classList.remove('active');
  document.getElementById('formSuccess').classList.add('show');
  document.getElementById('formPrivacy').style.display = 'none';
}

// ── CLINIC SLIDESHOW ──
let totalSlides = 8;
function nextSlide() { goToSlide((curSlide + 1) % totalSlides); }
function prevSlide() { goToSlide((curSlide - 1 + totalSlides) % totalSlides); }
let curSlide = 0;
const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.c-slide');
const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.c-dot');

function goToSlide(n) {
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.c-slide');
  const dots   = document.querySelectorAll('.c-dot');
  if (!slides.length || !dots.length) return;
  slides[curSlide].classList.remove('active');
  dots[curSlide].classList.remove('active');
  dots[curSlide].style.width = '7px';
  curSlide = n;
  slides[curSlide].classList.add('active');
  dots[curSlide].classList.add('active');
  dots[curSlide].style.width = '22px';
  resetSlideTimer();
}

let slideTimer;
function resetSlideTimer() {
  clearInterval(slideTimer);
  slideTimer = setInterval(() => goToSlide((curSlide + 1) % totalSlides), 4800);
}

// ── INTERSECTION OBSERVER: lazy load map + clinic fade-in ──
const clinicGrid = document.getElementById('clinicGrid');

const clinicObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      clinicGrid.classList.add('visible');
      resetSlideTimer();
      clinicObserver.disconnect();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.05, rootMargin: '200px' });
if (clinicGrid) clinicObserver.observe(clinicGrid);

// ── CTA HEADING REVEAL + SMILE FLIP ──
const ctaHeading = document.getElementById('ctaHeading');
const smileFlip = document.getElementById('smileFlip');
let smileFlipDone = false;

const ctaObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting && !smileFlipDone) {
      ctaHeading.classList.add('cta-visible');
      smileFlipDone = true;
      // After heading reveals (1.4s), flip Smile → icon
      setTimeout(() => {
        smileFlip.classList.add('smile-flipped');
        // After 1.6s pause, flip back
        setTimeout(() => {
          smileFlip.classList.remove('smile-flipped');
        }, 1600);
      }, 1400);
      ctaObserver.disconnect();
    }
  });
}, { threshold: 0.6 });
ctaObserver.observe(ctaHeading);
function handleResize() {
  const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 900;
  // WhatsApp button always visible
  const submitBtn = document.getElementById('btnSubmit');
  submitBtn.querySelector('.hide-mobile').style.display = isMobile ? 'none' : 'inline';
  submitBtn.querySelector('.show-mobile').style.display = isMobile ? 'inline' : 'none';
}
handleResize();
window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);

}); // end DOMContentLoaded
</script>
</body>
</html>

}); // end DOMContentLoaded
